# Data Exchange Download

The Data Exchange Download screen allows the users of the Data Exchange module to get the latest version of the Spectrum Office Add-in which is used with Microsoft Excel and can be used in conjunction with the Data Exchange module.
To use the Spectrum Office Add-in, the Data Exchange module must be active, the Authorization ID must be defined, and the Spectrum Office Add-in must be installed on your local computer. The Data Exchange Download screen provides easy access to the current programming which is provided with each service pack.
Important: Each time a new release of Spectrum is installed, the Spectrum Office Add-in needs to be installed in order to have the current programming. To download the programming, define the Authorization ID, select the Export button, and follow the standard Spectrum download process.
See the following guides for reference:

- [Spectrum Office Add-in](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/9c1ae160-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..kZVPtk1zI4YkO63kD_0ZC4chph4Xd7fy4pLmxod1qec&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22SDX-SPECTRUM-OFFICE-ADDIN-2021R2.pdf%22)

- [Authorization Setup](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/9bd043d0-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..073eSymUK4dkI_SWAt0wJN5Ocnx7iXH05m4JjoM9QcU&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22SDX-AUTHORIZATION-SETUP-2021R2.pdf%22)
